chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS Before: Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Mr. Justice Riazat Ali Sahar [C.P. No.D-681 of 2025 (Asghar Ali v. Province of Sindh & others) Petitioner: Asghar Ali through Mr. Shahnawaz Ali Kunbhar, Advocate. Respondents: Province of Sindh and others through Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Ghulam Mustafa PS City Umerkot and SIP/SHO Ratan Sing. Date hearing & decision: 24.12.2025. O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J: - The petitioner has filed this Constitutional Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Pakistan, 1973, seeking quashment of FIR No.27 of 2025 under Sections 365, 147, 148, 149, 452, 114 PPC registered at PS Khokhrapar, District Umerkot by respondent No.5. Since the case is under investigation, a case report under section 173 Cr.P.C. shall be submitted to the competent Court, and the learned Magistrate shall pass appropriate orders after hearing the parties. This exercise of investigation and submission of report shall be completed within two weeks. Without touching the merits of the case, the petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
